title: Workforms Multi/Single-select "Other" Option
excerpt:
Instead of using a condition to add a new text field if “Other” is selected, I would love to see an “Other” option that allows the user to enter a short text string that populates on the board as “Other-[text string].” 
I…

posts.author: cchelf2 (Casey Chelf)
posts.cookedHtml:
Instead of using a condition to add a new text field if “Other” is selected, I would love to see an “Other” option that allows the user to enter a short text string that populates on the board as “Other-[text string].”

I use Workforms as intake, and a lot of times submitters have unique scenarios that we don’t want to create specific options for that affects all users.
